T H E 	9 	W O R D E - M A I L
S E Q U E N C E
T h e K n o w l e d g e
B u s i n e s s
B l u e p r i n t
Sending The 9 Word E-mail1
Make sure the responses go to a unique Gmail account like event@domain.com
»
» 	From Dean Graziosi (Personal)
» 	Subject: Getting together in LA
» 	Hi NAME... I’m doing a small group mastermind towards the end of January in
LA
» 	Would you like to join us?
» 	Dean
»
Mock replies:
• 	No thanks
• 	What are the dates for the upcoming events
• 	Send more information
• 	How much do these sessions cost, and does the price include lodging as well?
Either way is fine, I just want to know what to plan for.
You can use this worksheet specifically to follow along with the “The 9 Word E-mail Sequence” training video.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

T H E 	9 	W O R D E - M A I L
S E Q U E N C E
T h e K n o w l e d g e
B u s i n e s s
B l u e p r i n t
Your Next Reply:2
Reply From “Dean Graziosi (Personal)” – If they are interested at all, manipulate their email to sound personal to
them. Acknowledge something they said, answer their specific questions, etc... Example email below:
• 	From “Dean Graziosi (Personal)”
Hi NAME,
The room is separate but the rates are reasonable! (personalized to their questions or comments)
So, here’s what I’m doing in Los Angeles...
Since I will be in your area to speak to a big stage of people I’ve decided to use my time wisely and see if you would like to
hook up. I’ll be done speaking each day by 10:00 AM and figured we could connect from 11:00 to 6:00.
I’m going to spend 2 days with a small group of people working on the 8 principles in my new Millionaire Success habits
course to increase profits and success in your business and in life.
Plus it’s not a “live event” it’s a small mastermind so I will be able to go deep on where you are, where you want to go and
the help you design the perfect “How” to get there
I’ve done just a handful of events like these over the past 10 years and each one was amazing:) (and filled up fast)
The energy is really great in a small group like this. I’m used to doing 500+ person events, so it’s nice to really go deep with
people in an intimate setting.
I’ve got a whole “Success Process” I go through in private consultations. Instead of doing a 1-day session I’m going to go
deeper over 2 days with lots of one-on-ones, working on putting together real strategies, habits and processes for next level
success.
I will also share my marketing secrets that most people never get to learn about in a regular event from a stage.
It’s Tuesday/Wednesday, January 26th and 27th in the XYZ Hotel just outside LOCATION.
It’s the perfect environment for really focusing on your business and making this year the most profitable and successful
year of your life. .
It would be cool if you could come.
The cost is $7,500 and I just need to know if you want me to save you a spot for now... it looks like it’s going to fill up soon.
Let me know if you’re in and I’ll have Susan from my team give you a call to make sure you qualify for one of the few spots.
This is truly going to be an exciting event NAME.
See you in January,
Dean
T H E 	9 	W O R D E - M A I L
S E Q U E N C E
T h e K n o w l e d g e
B u s i n e s s
B l u e p r i n t
Questions/Comments/Concerns3
Next we wait for a reply. If they have questions we answer them. If they say they are in like the example email
below – then we make the hand off. See below...
Example: Still have a spot left in LA? If so, I’m in. How do I pay for it? – Chris
The Hand Off4
Ok now the handoff happens. I forward this to Susan and she replies accordingly. This would be the reply from me
once they said “they were in or reserve a spot”
• 	From “Dean Graziosi (Personal)”
•
• 	Great! So glad you want to join us! (I’ve copied Susan - she’s our Concierge for this event).
• 	Hi Susan...Fname is going to join us in LA… Can you get him all set up please?
•
• 	Thanks!
• 	Dean
The Gate Keeper Email5
Now Susan goes to replying from here.
• 	From Susan Sutton
•
• 	Subject: Re: Chris is coming to LA
•
Hi NAME,
Glad to hear you want to join Dean in LA :)
I just have a few qualifying questions to make sure it is 100% fit for you to have one of these few spots. What is the
best number and best time to reach you for a quick 5 minute call?
Can’t wait to chat,
Susan!
THEN SUSAN WOULD GET ON THE PHONE AND GO THROUGH THE SAME “GATE-KEEPER” SEQUENCE AND THE
“EXPERT CLOSE” SEQUENCE YOU LEARNED ABOUT IN MODULE 2
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

The Welcome Email6
SBJ: Can’t wait to see you in LA!
Hey NAME! Here’s what you need to know so far...
The event is going to be at the XYZ Hotel in LOCATION.
You should plan to arrive on Monday evening if you can as Dean will be hosting an informal get together starting at 7pm
at the hotel.
It will be a chance to meet everyone before the event.
The event will start at 11:00 am on Tuesday January 26th and go until 6:30 pm (or a little later) each day, ending on
Wednesday, January 27th
Usually the group truly bonds and will go out for dinner together on Tuesday evening right after the event.
If you need anything you can reach me at this email address, or our office number 800-XXX-XXXX
I know Dean is excited... And I hope you have a great time!
If you need anything at all, please let me know!
Sincerely,
Susan
PS - Please follow this link to complete a short intro about you and your business so I can put together some background
information for Dean before the event.
Hotel Details
XYZ Hotel
Phone Reservations: 1-888-XXX-XXXX
Internet Reservations: www.hotel.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
